name: auto-worktree
description: Automatically creates git worktrees when Claude modifies files, enabling safe parallel work without git conflicts.

skip_directories.description: Comma-separated list of absolute directory paths where auto-worktree should not activate (e.g. /path/to/notes,/path/to/scratch)

fetch_default_branch.description: Fetch the latest default branch from origin on session start (true/false, default: true)
